eko hi doṣo guṇasaṃnipāte nimajjatīndoḥ kiraṇeṣv ivāṅkaḥ doṣo+guṇa · divākarād rakṣati yo guhāsu līnaṃ divā bhītam ivāndhakāram yo+guhāsu · karma yajñaḥ phalaṃ svargas tāsāṃ tvaṃ prabhavo girām prabhavo+girām · vada saṃprati kasya bāṇatāṃ navacūtaprasavo gamiṣyati prasavaḥ→navacūtaprasavo +gamiṣyati

lāṅgūlavikṣepavisarpiśobhair itas tataś candramarīcigauraiḥ tataś+candra · ataś carācaraṃ viśvaṃ prabhavas tasya gīyase ataś+carācaraṃ · prayojanāpekṣitayā prabhūṇāṃ prāyaś calaṃ gauravam āśriteṣu prāyaś+calaṃ · nikāmataptā vividhena vahninā nabhaścareṇendhanasaṃbhṛtena ca nabhas+careṇa→nabhaścareṇendhanasaṃbhṛtena

śeṣāṅganirmāṇavidhau vidhātur lāvaṇya utpādya ivāsa yatnaḥ vidhātur+lāvaṇya · netrair avispanditapakṣmamālair lakṣyīkṛtaghrāṇam adhomayūkhaiḥ mālebhiḥ→avispanditapakṣmamālair +lakṣyīkṛta · pratikṣaṇaṃ saṃbhramaloladṛṣṭir līlāravindena nivārayantī dṛṣṭiḥ→saṃbhramaloladṛṣṭir +līlā · bhrūbhedibhiḥ sakampoṣṭhair lalitāṅgulitarjanaiḥ uṣṭhaiḥ→sakampoṣṭhair +lalita

śeṣāṅganirmāṇavidhau vidhātur lāvaṇya utpādya ivāsa yatnaḥ utpādya+iva · anvāsta ity apsarasāṃ mukhebhyaḥ śrutaṃ mayā matpraṇidhiḥ sa vargaḥ anvāsta+ity · haras tu kiṃcit pariluptadhairyaś candrodayārambha ivāmburāśiḥ ārambhe→candrodayārambha +iva · gata eva na te nivartate sa sakhā dīpa ivānilāhataḥ dīpa+iva

tato 'nukuryād viśadasya tasyās tāmrauṣṭhaparyastarucaḥ smitasya tāmra+oṣṭha→tāmrauṣṭhaparyastarucaḥ · tat prayātauṣadhiprasthaṃ siddhaye himavatpuram prayāta+oṣadhiprastham→prayātauṣadhiprasthaṃ · yatrauṣadhiprakāśena naktaṃ darśitasaṃcarāḥ yatra+oṣadhi→yatrauṣadhiprakāśena · athauṣadhīnām adhipasya vṛddhau tithau ca jāmitraguṇānvitāyām atha+oṣadhīnām→athauṣadhīnām

gaṇā nameruprasavāvataṃsā bhūrjatvacaḥ sparśavatīr dadhānāḥ gaṇā+nameru · manaḥśilāvicchuritā niṣeduḥ śaileyanaddheṣu śilātaleṣu vicchuritāḥ→manaḥśilāvicchuritā +niṣeduḥ · jvalanmaṇiśikhāś cainaṃ vāsukipramukhā niśi pramukhāḥ→vāsukipramukhā +niśi · viditaṃ vo yathā svārthā na me kāścit pravṛttayaḥ arthāḥ→svārthā +na

yad amogham apām antar uptaṃ bījam aja tvayā aja+tvayā · racitaṃ ratipaṇḍita tvayā svayam aṅgeṣu mamedam ārtavam paṇḍitaiḥ→ratipaṇḍita +tvayā · vacanīyam idaṃ vyavasthitaṃ ramaṇa tvām anuyāmi yady api ramaṇa+tvām · yathā śrutaṃ vedavidāṃ vara tvayā jano 'yam uccaiḥpadalaṅghanotsukaḥ vara+tvayā

athorudeśād avatārya pādam ākrāntisaṃbhāvitapādapīṭham atha+ūru→athorudeśād · tapātyaye vāribhir ukṣitā navair bhuvā sahoṣmāṇam amuñcad ūrdhvagam saha+ūṣmāṇam→sahoṣmāṇam · niveditaṃ niśvasitena soṣmaṇā manas tu me saṃśayam eva gāhate sa+ūṣmaṇā→soṣmaṇā · acchinnāmalasaṃtānāḥ samudrormyanivāritāḥ samudra+ūrmi→samudrormyanivāritāḥ

antaścarāṇāṃ marutāṃ nirodhān nivātaniṣkampam iva pradīpam nirodhān+nivāta · athendriyakṣobham ayugmanetraḥ punar vaśitvād balavan nigṛhya balavan+nigṛhya · caturaiḥ surakāminījanaiḥ priya yāvan na vilobhyase divi yāvan+na · vidhurāṃ jvalanātisarjanān nanu māṃ prāpaya patyur antikam atisarjanāt→jvalanātisarjanān +nanu

sa tatheti pratijñāya visṛjya kathamapyumām sa+tathā · yasya cetasi vartethāḥ sa tāvat kṛtināṃ varaḥ sa+tāvat · sa tair ākramayāmāsa śuddhāntaṃ śuddhakarmabhiḥ sa+tair · sa te duhitaraṃ sākṣāt sākṣī viśvasya karmaṇaḥ sa+te

na durvahaśroṇipayodharārtā bhindanti mandāṃ gatim aśvamukhyaḥ ārtāḥ→durvahaśroṇipayodharārtā +bhindanti · darīgṛhadvāravilambibimbās tiraskariṇyo jaladā bhavanti jaladā+bhavanti · gaṇā nameruprasavāvataṃsā bhūrjatvacaḥ sparśavatīr dadhānāḥ avataṃsāḥ→nameruprasavāvataṃsā +bhūrja · sa bhīmarūpaḥ śiva ity udīryate na santi yāthārthyavidaḥ pinākinaḥ sa+bhīma

darīgṛhadvāravilambibimbās tiraskariṇyo jaladā bhavanti tiraskariṇyo+jaladā · tāṃ pārvatīty ābhijanena nāmnā bandhupriyāṃ bandhujano juhāva janaḥ→bandhujano +juhāva · nalinīṃ kṣatasetubandhano jalasaṃghāta ivāsi vidrutaḥ bandhanaḥ→kṣatasetubandhano +jala · tam avekṣya ruroda sā bhṛśaṃ stanasaṃbādham uro jaghāna ca uro+jaghāna

āropitaṃ yad giriśena paścād ananyanārīkamanīyam aṅkam yad+giriśena · tad gaccha siddhyai kuru devakāryam artho 'yam arthāntarabhāvya eva tad+gaccha · krodhaṃ prabho saṃhara saṃhareti yāvad giraḥ khe marutāṃ caranti yāvad+giraḥ · varasyānanyapūrvasya viśokām akarod guṇaiḥ akarod+guṇaiḥ

anyonyaśobhājananād babhūva sādhāraṇo bhūṣaṇabhūṣyabhāvaḥ sādhāraṇo+bhūṣaṇa · ātmeśvarāṇāṃ na hi jātu vighnāḥ samādhibhedaprabhavo bhavanti prabhavaḥ→samādhibhedaprabhavo +bhavanti · vilokya vṛddhokṣam adhiṣṭhitaṃ tvayā mahājanaḥ smeramukho bhaviṣyati mukhaḥ→smeramukho +bhaviṣyati · yam āmananty ātmabhuvo 'pi kāraṇaṃ kathaṃ sa lakṣyaprabhavo bhaviṣyati prabhavaḥ→lakṣyaprabhavo +bhaviṣyati

tasyāḥ śalākāñjananirmiteva kāntir bhruvor ānatalekhayor yā lekhayoḥ→ānatalekhayor +yā · utpattaye havirbhoktur yajamāna ivāraṇim bhoktuḥ→havirbhoktur +yajamāna · tām asmadarthe yuṣmābhir yācitavyo himālayaḥ yuṣmābhir+yācitavyo · yenedaṃ dhriyate viśvaṃ dhuryair yānam ivādhvani dhuryair+yānam

tadāprabhṛty eva vimuktasaṅgaḥ patiḥ paśūnām aparigraho 'bhūt prabhṛti→tadāprabhṛty +eva · ātmanā kṛtinā ca tvam ātmany eva pralīyase ātmany+eva · yathā prasiddhair madhuraṃ śiroruhair jaṭābhir apy evam abhūt tadānanam apy+evam · mātaraṃ kalpayanty enām īśo hi jagataḥ pitā kalpayanty+enām

sarasāṃ suptapadmānāṃ prātar dīdhitimān iva dīdhitimān+iva · so 'haṃ tṛṣṇāturair vṛṣṭiṃ vidyutvān iva cātakaiḥ vidyutvān+iva · prakṛtyaiva śiloraskaḥ suvyakto himavān iti himavān+iti · tatrāvatīryācyutadattahastaḥ śaradghanād dīdhitimān ivokṣṇaḥ dīdhitimān+iva

guṇatrayavibhāgāya paścād bhedam upeyuṣe paścād+bhedam · yāvad bhavaty āhitasāyakasya matkārmukasyāsya nideśavartī yāvad+bhavaty · kusumāyudhapatni durlabhas tava bhartā na cirād bhaviṣyati cirād+bhaviṣyati · aśocyā hi pituḥ kanyā sadbhartre pratipāditā sat+bhartre→sadbhartre

iti tebhyaḥ stutīḥ śrutvā yathārthā hṛdayaṃgamāḥ yathārthā+hṛdayaṃgamāḥ · vījyate sa hi saṃsuptaḥ śvāsasādhāraṇānilaiḥ sa+hi · sa hi devaḥ paraṃ jyotis tamaḥpāre vyavasthitam sa+hi · viniyogaprasādā hi kiṅkarāḥ prabhaviṣṇuṣu prasādāḥ→viniyogaprasādā +hi

utpāṭya meruśṛṅgāṇi kṣuṇṇāni haritāṃ khuraiḥ haritāṃ+khuraiḥ · vidhinā jana eṣa vañcitas tvadadhīnaṃ khalu dehināṃ sukham adhīnam→tvadadhīnaṃ +khalu · viditaṃ khalu te yathā smaraḥ kṣaṇam apy utsahate na māṃ vinā viditaṃ+khalu · api svaśaktyā tapasi pravartase śarīram ādyaṃ khalu dharmasādhanam ādyaṃ+khalu

sa vāsavenāsanasaṃnikṛṣṭam ito niṣīdeti visṛṣṭabhūmiḥ ito+niṣīda · tāṃ prāṅmukhīṃ tatra niveśya tanvīṃ kṣaṇaṃ vyalambanta puro niṣaṇṇāḥ puro+niṣaṇṇāḥ · nordhvam īkṣaṇagatir na cāpy adho nābhito na purato na pṛṣṭhataḥ adho+na · nordhvam īkṣaṇagatir na cāpy adho nābhito na purato na pṛṣṭhataḥ purato+na

srastāṃ nitambād avalambamānā punaḥ punaḥ kesaradāmakāñcīm punaḥ+punaḥ · yogāt sa cāntaḥ paramātmasaṃjñaṃ dṛṣṭvā paraṃ jyotir upārarāma antar→cāntaḥ +paramātma · padaṃ saheta bhramarasya pelavaṃ śirīṣapuṣpaṃ na punaḥ patatriṇaḥ punaḥ+patatriṇaḥ · te himālayam āmantrya punaḥ prekṣya ca śūlinam punaḥ+prekṣya

bṛhanmaṇiśilāsālaṃ guptāv api manoharam guptāv+api · aṅkād yayāv aṅkam udīritāśīḥ sā maṇḍanān maṇḍanam anvabhuṅkta yayāv+aṅkam · viṣṇor haras tasya hariḥ kadācid vedhās tayos tāv api dhātur ādyau tāv+api · nābhipraviṣṭābharaṇaprabheṇa hastena tasthāv avalambya vāsaḥ tasthāv+avalambya

divākarād rakṣati yo guhāsu līnaṃ divā bhītam ivāndhakāram divākarād+rakṣati · abhyunnatāṅguṣṭhanakhaprabhābhir nikṣepaṇād rāgam ivodgirantau nikṣepaṇād+rāgam · kasyāścid āsīd raśanā tadānīm aṅguṣṭhamūlārpitasūtraśeṣā āsīd+raśanā · yad rataṃ ca sadayaṃ priyasya tat pārvatī viṣahate sma netarat yad+rataṃ

sa mānasīṃ merusakhaḥ pitṝṇāṃ kanyāṃ kulasya sthitaye sthitijñaḥ sa+mānasīṃ · sa mādhavenābhimatena sakhyā ratyā ca sāśaṅkam anuprayātaḥ sa+mādhavena · prayatnasaṃstambhitavikriyāṇāṃ kathaṃcid īśā manasāṃ babhūvuḥ īśā+manasāṃ · kapolasaṃsarpiśikhaḥ sa tasyā muhūrtakarṇotpalatāṃ prapede tasyā+muhūrta

śarīriṇāṃ sthāvarajaṅgamānāṃ sukhāya tajjanmadinaṃ babhūva tad+janma→tajjanmadinaṃ · dayitāsv anavasthitaṃ nṛṇāṃ na khalu prema calaṃ suhṛjjane suhṛd+jane→suhṛjjane · viveśa kaścij jaṭilas tapovanaṃ śarīrabaddhaḥ prathamāśramo yathā kaścij+jaṭilas · na tu suratasukheṣu chinnatṛṣṇo babhūva jvalana iva samudrāntargatas tajjaleṣu tad+jaleṣu→tajjaleṣu

pupoṣa lāvaṇyamayān viśeṣāñ jyotsnāntarāṇīva kalāntarāṇi viśeṣāñ+jyotsnā · ṛṣīñ jyotirmayān sapta sasmāra smaraśāsanaḥ ṛṣīñ+jyotis · prāsādaśṛṅgāṇi divāpi kurvañ jyotsnābhiṣekadviguṇadyutīni kurvañ+jyotsnā · tāṃ vilambitapanīyamekhalām udvahañ jaghanabhāradurvahām udvahañ+jaghana

nīvīm atikramya sitetarasya tanmekhalāmadhyamaṇer ivārciḥ tad+mekhalā→tanmekhalāmadhyamaṇer · tanmātaraṃ cāśrumukhīṃ duhitṛsnehaviklavām tad+mātaram→tanmātaraṃ · rekhāvibhaktaś ca vibhaktagātryāḥ kiṃcinmadhūcchiṣṭavimṛṣṭarāgaḥ kiṃcid+madhūcchiṣṭa→kiṃcinmadhūcchiṣṭavimṛṣṭarāgaḥ · sāgarād anapagā hi jāhnavī so 'pi tanmukharasaikanirvṛtiḥ tad+mukha→tanmukharasaikanirvṛtiḥ

sa dvinetro hareś cakṣuḥ sahasranayanādhikam sa+dvi · itaḥ sa daityaḥ prāptaśrīr neta evārhati kṣayam sa+daityaḥ · sa dakṣiṇāpāṅganiviṣṭamuṣṭiṃ natāṃsam ākuñcitasavyapādam sa+dakṣiṇa · daṃṣṭriṇo vanavarāhayūthapā daṣṭabhaṅgurabisāṅkurā iva yūthapāḥ→vanavarāhayūthapā +daṣṭa

śanaiḥ kṛtaprāṇavimuktir īśaḥ paryaṅkabandhaṃ nibiḍaṃ bibheda vimuktiḥ→kṛtaprāṇavimuktir +īśaḥ · bhavaty aniṣṭād api nāma duḥsahān manasvinīnāṃ pratipattir īdṛśī pratipattir+īdṛśī · nandane ciram ayugmalocanaḥ saspṛhaṃ suravadhūbhir īkṣitaḥ vadhūbhiḥ→suravadhūbhir +īkṣitaḥ · dhyānasaṃbhṛtavibhūtir īśvaraḥ prāviśan maṇiśilāgṛhaṃ rahaḥ vibhūtiḥ→dhyānasaṃbhṛtavibhūtir +īśvaraḥ

nivartayāsmād asadīpsitān manaḥ kva tadvidhas tvaṃ kva ca puṇyalakṣaṇā asat+īpsitāt→asadīpsitān · tām agauravabhedena munīṃś cāpaśyad īśvaraḥ apaśyat→cāpaśyad +īśvaraḥ · tad īṣadārdrāruṇagaṇḍalekham ucchvāsikālāñjanarāgam akṣṇoḥ tad+īṣat · ānanena na tu tāvad īśvaraś cakṣuṣā ciram umāmukhaṃ papau tāvad+īśvaraś

bhāgīrathīnirjharasīkarāṇāṃ voḍhā muhuḥ kampitadevadāruḥ muhuḥ+kampita · srastāṃ nitambād avalambamānā punaḥ punaḥ kesaradāmakāñcīm punaḥ+kesara · dhūpoṣmaṇā tyājitam ārdrabhāvaṃ keśāntam antaḥkusumaṃ tadīyam antar+kusumam→antaḥkusumaṃ

sa mānasīṃ merusakhaḥ pitṝṇāṃ kanyāṃ kulasya sthitaye sthitijñaḥ mānasīṃ+meru · śṛṅgeṇa ca sparśanimīlitākṣīṃ mṛgīm akaṇḍūyata kṛṣṇasāraḥ akṣām→sparśanimīlitākṣīṃ +mṛgīm · bhartṛvallabhatayā hi mānasīṃ mātur asyati śucaṃ vadhūjanaḥ mānasīṃ+mātur

menāṃ munīnām api mānanīyām ātmānurūpāṃ vidhinopayeme vidhinā+upayeme→vidhinopayeme · jagaccharaṇyasya nirāśiṣaḥ sataḥ kim ebhir āśopahatātmavṛttibhiḥ āśā+upahata→āśopahatātmavṛttibhiḥ · prakṛtyaiva śiloraskaḥ suvyakto himavān iti śilā+uraskaḥ→śiloraskaḥ

sā rājahaṃsair iva saṃnatāṅgī gateṣu līlāñcitavikrameṣu aṅgā→saṃnatāṅgī +gateṣu · sā maṅgalasnānaviśuddhagātrī gṛhītapatyudgamanīyavastrā gātrā→maṅgalasnānaviśuddhagātrī +gṛhīta · khaṃ prasuptam iva saṃsthite ravau tejaso mahata īdṛśī gatiḥ īdṛśī+gatiḥ

tayā gṛhītaṃ nu mṛgāṅganābhyas tato gṛhītaṃ nu mṛgāṅganābhiḥ tato+gṛhītaṃ · ito gamiṣyāmy athaveti vādinī cacāla bālā stanabhinnavalkalā ito+gamiṣyāmy · tato gaṇaiḥ śūlabhṛtaḥ purogair udīrito maṅgalatūryaghoṣaḥ tato+gaṇaiḥ
sa kṛttivāsās tapase yatātmā gaṅgāpravāhokṣitadevadāru sa+kṛttivāsās · śṛṇu yena sa karmaṇā gataḥ śalabhatvaṃ haralocanārciṣi sa+karmaṇā · evaṃ vācyaḥ sa kanyārtham iti vo nopadiśyate sa+kanyā

giriśam upacacāra pratyahaṃ sā sukeśī niyamitaparikhedā tacchiraścandrapādaiḥ tad+śiraḥ→tacchiraścandrapādaiḥ · tacchāsanāt kānanam eva sarvaṃ citrārpitārambham ivāvatasthe tad+śāsanāt→tacchāsanāt · umātanau gūḍhatanoḥ smarasya tacchaṅkinaḥ pūrvam iva praroham tad+śaṅkinaḥ→tacchaṅkinaḥ

abhyasyanti taṭāghātaṃ nirjitairāvatā gajāḥ airāvatāḥ→nirjitairāvatā +gajāḥ · vinyastaśuklāguru cakrur asyā gorocanāpatravibhaṅgam aṅgam asyā+gorocanā · sa gopatiṃ nandibhujāvalambī śārdūlacarmāntaritorupṛṣṭham sa+gopatiṃ

aṃśād ṛte niṣiktasya nīlalohitaretasaḥ aṃśād+ṛte · vasatiṃ priya kāmināṃ priyās tvad ṛte prāpayituṃ ka īśvaraḥ tvad+ṛte · samadivasaniśīthaṃ saṅginas tatra śambhoḥ śatam agamad ṛtūnāṃ sāgram ekā niśeva agamad+ṛtūnāṃ

ājñāpaya jñātaviśeṣa puṃsāṃ lokeṣu yat te karaṇīyam asti viśeṣaiḥ→jñātaviśeṣa +puṃsāṃ · kāmas tu bāṇāvasaraṃ pratīkṣya pataṅgavad vahnimukhaṃ vivikṣuḥ pratīkṣya+pataṃga · ayi saṃprati dehi darśanaṃ smara paryutsuka eṣa mādhavaḥ smara+paryutsuka

tava prasādāt kusumāyudho 'pi sahāyam ekaṃ madhum eva labdhvā tava+prasādāt · avaimi saubhāgyamadena vañcitaṃ tava priyaṃ yaś caturāvalokinaḥ tava+priyaṃ · indracāpapariveṣaśūnyatāṃ nirjharās tava pitur vrajanty amī tava+pitur
sa ca tvadekeṣunipātasādhyo brahmāṅgabhūr brahmaṇi yojitātmā sa+ca · yogāt sa cāntaḥ paramātmasaṃjñaṃ dṛṣṭvā paraṃ jyotir upārarāma sa+ca · trivikramodyatasyāsīt sa ca svābhāvikas tava sa+ca

ātmeśvarāṇāṃ na hi jātu vighnāḥ samādhibhedaprabhavo bhavanti ātma+īśvarāṇām→ātmeśvarāṇāṃ · ity uvāceśvarān vācaṃ prāñjaliḥ pṛthivīdharaḥ uvāca+īśvarān→uvāceśvarān · yathāpradeśaṃ bhujageśvarāṇāṃ kariṣyatām ābharaṇāntaratvam bhujaga+īśvarāṇām→bhujageśvarāṇāṃ
